title: Okay, this unleashed my agent
summary: AI Jason reviews recent developments in AI agents including autoresearch, multi-layer memory systems in Claude Code, and self-evolving mechanisms in Hermes and Openclaw. The video presents practical tools and frameworks for building AI agents, with timestamps covering specific techniques and comparisons.
